subcodes.first_line: The denizens of the Abha Kingdom keenly await and vigilantly anticipate the day when each one of us shall arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهل ملکوت ابهى منتظر و مترصد آنند که هریک از ما یوماً قیام نمائیم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @call to action
